ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_patterns" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the crime pattern was recorded */,
  "temporal_id" INTEGER /* A unique identifier for the temporal sequence of crime patterns */,
  "cp_location" REAL /* Location coordinate for the crime pattern (e.g., longitude) */,
  "cp_location_norm" REAL /* Normalized location coordinate for spatial analysis */,
  "cp_score" REAL /* A score representing the severity or likelihood of the crime pattern */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the type of crime */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the officer who reported the crime */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the incident */,
  "victims_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims involved */,
  "suspects_count" INTEGER /* Number of suspects involved */,
  "reporting_time" TEXT /* Time when the crime was reported */,
  "dispatch_time" TEXT /* Time when the police were dispatched */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the incident was resolved */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* Description of evidence collected */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Lighting conditions at the time of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temporal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_patterns_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_patterns_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "temporal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the temporal sequence of crime patterns */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk associated with the crime pattern */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation or action to be taken based on the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the type of crime being analyzed */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Specific geographic area covered by the analysis */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "economic_status" TEXT /* Economic status of the area */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., trend analysis, hotspot analysis) */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the model or algorithm used for analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis results */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken based on the analysis */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the actions taken */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Whether follow-up actions are required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the follow-up actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_analysis_temporal_id FOREIGN KEY ("temporal_id") REFERENCES crime_patterns ("temporal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_analysis_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the officer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
